title: glaucium elegans subsp. bracteatum
intro: Glaucium elegans subsp. bracteatum, also known as the Greek poppy or horn poppy, is a flowering plant species within the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving pain and inflammation, due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Glaucium elegans subsp. bracteatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations often involve drying and processing the plant's flowers and seeds to create teas, infusions, and extracts, but caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
